message:
feat(tui,analysis): add light/dark theme support, blocker-aware ETA forecasting

Replace hardcoded dark-mode colour palette in TUI tokens module with
runtime light/dark theme detection via BV_THEME env var.  Adds 9 status
colours, 5 priority levels with background tints, type icons, footer
styling tokens, sparkline rendering, heatmap gradient, and repo badge
colour rotation.  Refactors status_icon/type_icon from if-else chains
to match expressions and adds hooked/tombstone/draft/refactor variants.

In forecast, estimate_eta_for_issue now recursively accounts for open
blockers: the blocked issue's ETA includes the maximum wait time across
all transitive dependencies, with cycle detection via a HashSet guard.
Includes a test verifying blocked issues report longer ETAs with an
explanatory factor string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
